title: Saudi Arabia, Russia 90-day visa-free travel begins from May 11: Ministry announces
summary_full: Saudi Arabia and Russia are implementing a visa-free travel agreement starting May 11, allowing citizens short-term visits of up to 90 days annually for tourism, business, and family. This initiative, stemming from a December 2025 deal, aims to foster closer people-to-people connections and enhance bilateral cooperation, though work, study, residency, and religious travel still require visas.
